systemPromptSections: Role constraint: deterministic kernel adapter, not chat assistant.
Current state injection: cwd, vfs snapshot, meta context, raw command, command token, argv.
Hard rules: strict JSON response, shell simulation behavior, tip/suggestions/mutations/ui_events constraints.

requestPayloadFields.name: session_id
requestPayloadFields.purpose: Per-session identity for limits and trace

guardrails: Strict request schema + key whitelist + payload caps.
Per-session/per-IP/global rate limits via Durable Object counters.
Recognized executable gating before AI invocation.
Response sanitization and hard caps for text, mutations, UI events, and suggestions.
Client-side mutation and event guard before apply/dispatch.

steps.label: Command input captured
steps.description: User submits terminal text; shell splits tokens and normalizes command key.

steps.label: Local command gate
steps.description: Local command set executes fast path; unknown commands branch to LLM flow.
failureModes: local command may return shell error output

steps.label: Turnstile token resolution
steps.description: Client polls Turnstile widget for single-use token before making request.
failureModes: token timeout or widget lifecycle error

steps.label: POST /worker/ payload composition
steps.description: Client sends command, tokenized fields, cwd, and vfs snapshot to worker endpoint.
steps.input: command context + turnstile token + session id

steps.label: Request schema + origin validation
steps.description: Worker parses raw body, validates payload contract and enforces origin policy.

steps.label: Rate-limit checks
steps.description: Worker enforces session/IP/global windows before expensive operations.

steps.label: Turnstile verification
steps.description: Worker verifies token against Cloudflare endpoint and allowed hostnames.

steps.label: Recognized command gate
steps.description: Unknown command tokens short-circuit to deterministic not-found response.

steps.label: System prompt assembly
steps.description: Worker assembles deterministic shell adapter prompt with strict JSON and rules.

steps.label: Workers AI call
steps.description: Worker executes env.AI.run with system + user messages and no streaming.

steps.label: Response normalization
steps.description: Worker extracts candidate payload and normalizes to shell response object.
failureModes: non-JSON model output becomes guarded kernel panic stderr

steps.label: Response caps + sanitization
steps.description: Worker enforces max sizes and allowed actions for stdout/stderr/tip/mutations/events/suggestions.

steps.label: Client parse + mutation guard/apply
steps.description: Client parses response, renders output, sanitizes mutations, then applies overlay VFS changes.
failureModes: invalid mutation dropped or apply failure surfaced

steps.label: UI events execution
steps.description: Client dispatches LLM UI events (open path/app) through guarded event handlers.
